hero.title:
Travel Korea
in Style.
hero.subtitle:
Premium private taxi for international travelers
from airport to any destination in Korea

why.title: Why Choose TAGO
why.subtitle: Premium service designed for international travelers

items.title: Japanese LINE Support
items.desc: Reach us in Japanese via LINE — before and during your trip. No Korean needed to book or get help.

items.title: Premium Vehicles
items.desc: Clean, comfortable luxury vehicles for every ride. Experience VIP treatment from pickup to drop-off.

items.title: Simple On-Site Payment
items.desc: Cash and card both accepted. Pay the driver directly on-site. Ask for a fare estimate via LINE before your trip.

items.title: Easy LINE Booking
items.desc: Reserve your ride through LINE before your trip. Simple, convenient, and confirmed in advance.

pricing.title: Our Routes
pricing.subtitle: Choose a route that fits your travel style
pricing.note: ※ Contact us on LINE for fare estimates. Cash and card both accepted.

items.title: Airport ↔ Seoul
items.desc: Smooth transfer from the airport to Seoul city center.

items.title: Seoul ↔ Other Regions
items.desc: Charter to Busan, Gangwon, and beyond.

items.title: Flexible Charter
items.desc: Ideal for sightseeing and shopping. 4h · 8h · 12h available.

steps.title: Message Us on LINE
steps.desc: Tell us your travel dates, group size, destination, and preferred course. English is fine!

steps.title: Confirm Route & Price
steps.desc: Our team will suggest the best route and confirm pricing. Booking is confirmed only when you're satisfied.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Ride
steps.desc: Your driver will meet you at the designated time and place. Sit back and enjoy the journey.

trust.title: A Ride You Can Count On
trust.subtitle: An experienced driver dedicated to making your Korea trip smooth and comfortable

points.title: Years of Experience
points.desc: A professional driver with extensive experience navigating Korea's roads, so you can sit back and relax.

points.title: Smooth, Safe Driving
points.desc: Calm and careful behind the wheel — no sudden braking, no rushing. Your comfort comes first.

points.title: Clean, Spacious Cabin
points.desc: The car is cleaned before every ride. Plenty of room for luggage and travel gear.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Explore Korea?
ctaSection.subtitle: Message us on LINE — we reply in Japanese.

footer.tagline: Making Korea travel smarter and more comfortable.
